content.verdict: Milaidhoo is Baa Atoll's boutique treasure — 50 thatched villas set inside a UNESCO Biosphere Reserve, with the iconic floating Ba'theli restaurant serving Thai-Maldivian fusion. Romantic, design-driven and perfectly sized, it is widely considered one of the Maldives' top honeymoon islands.
content.best_room: The Water Pool Villa with its curved private pool jutting over the lagoon and a daybed on the water. For barefoot beach romance, the Beach Pool Villa sits on a stretch of sugar-white sand.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival & Seaplane Transfer
itinerary_7_nights.description: 35-minute seaplane from Malé. Villa orientation with your butler, sunset Champagne on the pool deck.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Reef & Ba'theli
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning snorkel on Milaidhoo's rich house reef, spa afternoon, dinner at Ba'theli — the dhoni-shaped floating restaurant.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Hanifaru Bay Manta Snorkel
itinerary_7_nights.description: Guided trip to UNESCO Hanifaru Bay for the world's largest manta ray aggregation (seasonal), lunch back at Ocean restaurant.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Couples Spa Day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Sunrise yoga, full-day spa journey with traditional Maldivian rituals, private beach dinner with fire dancers.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Sandbank Castaway
itinerary_7_nights.description: Boat drop on a deserted sandbank with picnic hamper, snorkel gear and Champagne. Sunset dolphin cruise.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Culinary Journey
itinerary_7_nights.description: Cooking class with the Maldivian chef, traditional dhoni-line fishing, private dinner in the wine cellar.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell morning
itinerary_7_nights.description: Floating breakfast in your pool, final reef swim, seaplane home.

caveats: Hanifaru Bay manta season is May–November only
Dinner at Ba'theli requires advance booking

faqs.question: Good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Exceptional — consistently ranked among the top 3 honeymoon resorts in the Maldives.

faqs.question: Best time to visit?
faqs.answer: May–November for manta rays; December–April for dry sunny days.

faqs.question: Adults-only?
faqs.answer: No, but the resort is famously couple-heavy and serene.

faqs.question: How to get there?
faqs.answer: 35-minute seaplane transfer from Velana International Airport (MLE).
